title: Professional email: follow-up
subtitle: Follow up without sounding impatient.
overview: A follow-up should be respectful and clear.
Mention previous message and why you need an answer.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I wanted to follow up on...
I understand that you may be busy.
It would be useful for me to know...

items.es: Quería hacer seguimiento del mensaje que envié el lunes.
items.en: I wanted to follow up on the message I sent on Monday.

items.es: Entiendo que puede estar ocupado estos días.
items.en: I understand that you may be busy these days.

items.es: Me sería útil saber si la reunión sigue confirmada.
items.en: It would be useful for me to know if the meeting is still confirmed.

items.es: Si necesita más información, puedo enviársela hoy.
items.en: If you need more information, I can send it to you today.

items.es: Gracias de antemano por su ayuda.
items.en: Thank you in advance for your help.
